description: embeddingGemma is a 300M parameter embedding model from Google
nomic-embed-text-v2-moe is a multilingual MoE text embedding model that excels at multilingual retrieval. It supports 100+ languages with strong performance across all supported languages.

FlagEmbedding can map any text to a low-dimensional dense vector which can be used for tasks like retrieval, classification, clustering, or semantic search. And it also can be used in vector databases for LLMs.
